handlers.name: ChangeSkillUseAmountHandler
handlers.description: Modifies the number of uses consumed when a skill is used. Applied on skill add and removed on handler removal.

functions.name: OnAnySkillAdded
functions.purpose: When a new skill is added, applies the use amount change to matching skills

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.purpose: Iterates all active skills on mission start and applies use amount changes

functions.name: OnRemoved
functions.purpose: Reverses the use amount change by applying negative value when handler is removed

functions.name: TryRemoveEffect
functions.purpose: Attempts to remove the effect from a specific skill

effect_fields.name: SkillFilter
effect_fields.description: Filters which skills are affected by the use amount change. If null, affects all skills.

effect_fields.name: UseAmountChange
effect_fields.description: The amount to add (positive) or subtract (negative) from skill uses consumed. Passed to Skill.ChangeUsesConsumed().

handlers.name: ChangeUsesPerSquaddieHandler
handlers.description: Grants additional skill uses based on the number of squaddie members (elements) in the entity minus one. Supports both flat and percentage-based bonuses.

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.purpose: Calculates bonus uses based on squaddie count and applies to matching skills with limited uses

effect_fields.name: UsesPerSquaddie
effect_fields.description: Flat bonus uses granted per additional squaddie member. Formula: baseUses + (UsesPerSquaddie * (squaddieCount - 1))

effect_fields.name: UsesPerSquaddiePercent
effect_fields.description: Percentage bonus uses per squaddie. Calculated as: baseUses + (baseUses * UsesPerSquaddiePercent / 100.0). The lower of flat or percentage bonus is used.

effect_fields.name: SkillFilter
effect_fields.description: Filters which skills receive per-squaddie use bonuses. If null, affects all skills with limited uses.

handlers.calculation_notes: The handler gets the entity's element list count (squaddieCount), subtracts 1, then calculates: flatBonus = baseUses + UsesPerSquaddie * (squaddieCount-1), percentBonus = baseUses + baseUses * UsesPerSquaddiePercent / 100. The minimum of flat and percent bonus is applied to both Skill.UsesMax (0xac) and Skill.UsesConsumed (0xa8).

handlers.name: SetUsesPerElementHandler
handlers.description: Sets skill uses based on the number of living elements in the entity. Dynamically updates when elements die.

functions.name: GetLivingElements
functions.purpose: Returns the count of living elements in the entity

functions.name: OnElementDeath
functions.purpose: Recalculates uses when an element dies. Identical logic to UpdateUses.

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.purpose: Calls UpdateUses and sets initial UsesConsumed

functions.name: UpdateUses
functions.purpose: Recalculates uses based on current living element count

effect_fields.name: UsesPerElement
effect_fields.description: Number of uses granted per living element. Formula: elementCount * UsesPerElement

handlers.calculation_notes: The handler multiplies element count by UsesPerElement and sets Skill.UsesMax (0xac). If new max is less than current UsesConsumed (0xa8), it clamps UsesConsumed to the new max. Also marks the skill container as dirty (offset 0x59).

handlers.name: SynchronizeItemUsesHandler
handlers.description: Synchronizes uses consumed across all skills derived from the same item template. Used for shared-use items.

functions.name: OnUse
functions.purpose: Called when the skill is used. Synchronizes uses to other skills from same template.

functions.name: Synchronize
functions.purpose: Copies UsesConsumed from the source skill to all sibling skills sharing the same template

related_fields.name: Template
related_fields.description: Reference to the skill's template, used to find sibling skills

related_fields.name: Skills
related_fields.description: List of all skills instantiated from this template

related_fields.name: UsesConsumed
related_fields.description: Current uses consumed, copied between synchronized skills

handlers.notes: No effect-specific fields at 0x58+. This handler operates by finding all skills from the same BaseSkillTemplate and copying the UsesConsumed value between them.

common_skill_fields.name: Unknown_39
common_skill_fields.description: Checked before applying per-squaddie bonuses. If true, skill is skipped.

common_skill_fields.name: UsesConsumed
common_skill_fields.description: Current number of uses that have been consumed

common_skill_fields.name: UsesMax
common_skill_fields.description: Maximum number of uses available for the skill
